heading: Four ways I create measurable savings
subhead: Same playbook across Telecom, FinTech and ICT — every engagement ties to a € or % target agreed up front.

items.title: Cost & License Consolidation
items.desc: Merge duplicate enterprise processes, retire legacy tools. EUR 500k+ license savings delivered at NTT Ltd. by collapsing 3 Opp2Cash workflows into one.

items.title: SAP S/4HANA ↔ PEGA Migrations
items.desc: Lead the functional side of ERP / workflow transitions end-to-end — discovery, future-state design, migration, and adoption. 20% productivity gain at S.W.I.F.T.

items.title: Automation & FTE Recovery
items.desc: Ticket-quality automation, variable billing, case-management workflows. 15+ FTE-equivalent capacity created, USD 100k+ annual run-rate at BT.

items.title: Process Redesign & Adoption
items.desc: Lean Six Sigma redesign plus change management. 50% incident volume reduction (BT hung-line) and 21% adoption uplift on PEGA rollouts.
